title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: Dan Aykroyd sheds light on shipwrecks, plane crashes and UFO sightings. Later, he explores the Lake Michigan Triangle, weird wilderness and other spooky places.

title: The Kingdom of Krishna
desc: A land of legend, Dwarka is one of the prominent pilgrimage sites in Hinduism. It holds historical and mythological significance as the home of Lord Krishna.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: Rick gets into preparation mode for a fast food face lift when a Big Mac Jail, belonging to a 1970s McDonald's PlayPlace set, arrives in the shop.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Santa Clarita's auction attracts buyers with promising units. Subsequently, Ivy and Isaiah opt for volume, reaping rewards while Brandi cleverly secures a locker, outmanoeuvring competitors.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Out in Hesperia, California, when Mary faces transportation troubles, she decides to team up with Kenny and takes him out to pasture.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Brandi and Lisa compete for a pair of lockers, while Ivy takes his lucky sneakers to Van Nuys. Also, Kenny gambles on a new unit.

title: Tour D' Royale
desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Discover the skilled smith who passes three gruelling challenges in order to win 20,000 dollars for themselves and $10,000 in forging equipment for their shop.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Jenn struggles with melting butter sculptures under the scorching Texas sun. Simultaneously, Jessica Samko's tardiness disrupts a middle school play's dress rehearsal.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

desc: The host sheds light on a solar revolution, cruelty-free leather, a unique building in Gujarat and a wedding hall that comes to one's backyard.

title: Life After People
desc: In the absence of humans, the deserts which were once subdued will return to reclaim great victories, from the shimmering lights of Las Vegas to the towering glory of Dubai's Burj Khalifa.

title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
desc: Look into the many prison escapes of James Earl Ray, a notorious escape artist and assassin who killed Martin Luther King Junior.

title: Nature Gone Wild
desc: Two brave fishermen engage in a tense struggle with a gigantic crocodile. Meanwhile, a bear tightly embraces a bow hunter.

title: The Fast History Of
desc: The filmmaker delves into the history of a popular cookie-manufacturing company that overcame several obstacles to make a mark in the market.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: A unique quarter-scale model of 1932 Hudson car is brought to the shop. Meanwhile, a 1950's pillow speaker is brought for repair.

title: Forged in Fire: Beat the Judges
desc: The contestants have a unique opportunity to decide their own test, materials and also the judge they will compete against.

desc: Explore an interesting cafe in Indore, who encourage customers to smash their crokery. Also, meet Bandicoot, a revolutionary robot designed to clean sewage systems.

desc: Ryan works on a secret project for Bones Legacy. Meanwhile, a Chevy Impala redefines the term low-rider, stunning Mike and Roli. Later, Danny checks out a Satellite Sebring but cannot crack a deal.

desc: The filmmaker explores some of the unusual causes of death including a lawnmower killing a football spectator, deadly beards and more.

desc: Nuno Pontes led six men out of the Pittsburgh State Penitentiary by tunneling under the prison wall. However, they were caught at Texas and sent back to the penal institution.
